name: tala-project-tracker
description: Use Tala as a local project issue tracker for Codex work.

interface.shortDescription: Local issue tracking for Codex agents.
interface.longDescription: Adds Tala workflow guidance and MCP tools for planning, issue tracking, progress updates, and handoff in a project-local tala.db.
defaultPrompt: Use Tala to plan this work and keep the issue updated.
Leave a Tala handoff for the next agent.
